monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.description: Select a monitor to display the avatar on.
monitor.shortcutHint: Press Cmd+Shift+M to quickly switch to the next monitor.
monitor.physicalOnly: Only physically connected monitors are supported. macOS virtual desktops (Spaces) are not included.

globalShortcut.title: Global Voice Shortcut
globalShortcut.description: Toggle voice input even when another app is focused.
globalShortcut.shortcutHint: Click the input, then press your key combination.
globalShortcut.registerErrorMessage: Failed to register global shortcut ({{accelerator}}). It may be in use by another app or blocked by system privacy settings. Details: {{detail}}
globalShortcut.registerErrorToast: Failed to register the global shortcut.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.name: Avatar Name
avatar.personalityPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Bright and playful, but replies are concise and empathetic

initialView.title: Initial View
initialView.description: Drag the head to adjust the gaze, then save. The same gaze will be applied on app start.

animation.title: Animation
animation.sequenceDevOnly: Dev build only: Announces each motion via speech bubble before sequential playback.
animation.motionClipsWarning: Cannot start demo while Motion Clips is disabled.
animation.faceOnlyWarning: Cannot run demo in Face/Expression Only mode.
animation.faceOnlyDescription: Disables full-body motions (clips/gestures/dance) and keeps only facial expressions, head direction, and gaze.

lighting.title: Lighting
lighting.dragHint: Drag the sun icon near the avatar to adjust light direction.

freeMovement.title: Free Movement
freeMovement.description: Place the avatar anywhere on screen. It can also be moved off-screen.

speechBubble.title: Speech Bubble
speechBubble.description: Display AI responses as a speech bubble above the avatar.

avatar.info: Supported format: VRM 0.x and 1.0 models. Recommended file size: under 30MB for smooth performance.

licenses.title: Open Source / Model Licenses
licenses.description: Licenses and reference links for open-source software, AI services, and models used by this app.
licenses.note: This information is for reference. Always verify the latest LICENSE and terms before redistribution or production use.

onboarding.avatarNameDescription: This is your first launch. Please enter the avatar name you want to use.

selectVrm.title: Please Select a VRM Model
selectVrm.description: The production build does not include a default avatar. Select your own .vrm file to apply it immediately.
selectVrm.changeHint: After selection, you can change to a different VRM anytime in the Avatar settings panel.
selectVrm.error: Unable to open file picker. Please restart the app or try again from the settings panel.

modelDownload.title: Model Download
modelDownload.description: Downloading AI models required to run the app. This is only needed once.

auth.title: Welcome to AMA
auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.mockModeNotice: Test mode — OAuth keys not set, click to proceed with mock login
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.deleteAccountWarning: Deleting your account will permanently remove all cloud data.
auth.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service
auth.agreeToPrivacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy

errors.tokenExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again
errors.stateMismatch: Security verification failed. Please try again
errors.timeout: Sign-in timed out. Please try again
errors.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

sections.heading: 1. Purpose
sections.body: These terms define the conditions and procedures for using AMA (the 'Service').

sections.heading: 2. Service Description
sections.body: AMA is an AI avatar desktop app that runs locally. Conversation history is stored only on your device and is never sent to our servers.

sections.heading: 3. Data Collection
sections.body: Upon signing in via OAuth, we collect your email address, display name, and profile picture URL. API keys and conversation content are never collected.

sections.heading: 4. Prohibited Use
sections.body: You may not use the Service for illegal purposes, impersonate others, or interfere with service operations.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer
sections.body: We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI responses. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Service.

sections.heading: 6. Account Deletion
sections.body: You may delete your account at any time from the app settings. All server-side data is permanently deleted immediately upon account deletion.

sections.heading: Data Collected
sections.body: Email address, display name, OAuth provider (Google, Apple, Meta, X), profile picture URL, and terms agreement timestamp.

sections.heading: Data NOT Collected
sections.body: Conversation history (stored locally on device), LLM API keys (stored locally on device), and voice data.

sections.heading: Storage Location
sections.body: Supabase (servers located in the United States, supabase.com). See Supabase's Privacy Policy for details.

sections.heading: Retention Period
sections.body: All data is permanently deleted immediately upon account deletion.

sections.heading: Third-Party Sharing
sections.body: We do not share your personal information with third parties.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries, please open an issue on GitHub.
